note: Estimated benchmark results — run `cargo bench` for real numbers on your hardware.
hardware: M2 MacBook Pro, 16GB RAM, Apple NVMe SSD

results.note: estimated — BTreeMap-like insert with O(log N) tree splits
estimated — O(log N) tree traversal from root to leaf
estimated — LRU page cache hit; no disk I/O for hot pages
estimated — O(end-start) leaf list walk; 1 tree traversal + ~100 leaf reads
estimated — WAL fsync is the bottleneck (300-500μs per fsync on NVMe)
estimated — hot in-memory; dominated by read latency
